concept: Year / Complete Seasonal Cycle / Solar Circuit
description: The period of time it takes the earth to orbit the sun; a complete cycle of seasons. 'Torua' names the great cycle—all seasons experienced, the circle complete, time returning to its start.
sound_symbolism: The word completes its circle. 'To' begins with clear definition, cycle starting. 'Ru' rolls through the seasons. Finally 'a' opens to completion, year fulfilled.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'ta torua' (one year). The largest commonly used unit of personal time. Contains all seasons, all holidays, all agricultural cycles.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: The year was life's great rhythm—planting to harvest, birth to death, the cycle that contained all others.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Each year offers complete practice—all conditions arise, all challenges appear, nothing is missing.
